name: A & S Foreign Exchange INC
description_short: A & S Foreign Exchange Inc. is a New York-based currency exchange and traveler's check service operating for over 27 years, offering competitive rates on major world currencies.
description_long:
A & S Foreign Exchange Inc. has been operating as a foreign currency exchange service in New York for over 27 years. The company is located at 1226 Broadway in Manhattan and positions itself as a reliable destination for customers needing currency conversion and travel-related financial services.

The company offers two primary services: currency exchange for a wide range of major world currencies (including AUD, CAD, EUR, GBP, JPY, MXP, and others) and traveler's check buying in both foreign currencies and USD. According to their website, they accept only paper currency for exchange and claim to provide competitive rates compared to competitors in New York City. They advertise fast service, typically completing exchanges within minutes.

A & S Foreign Exchange distinguishes itself by emphasizing long-standing business relationships, competitive pricing, and personalized customer service. The company highlights 27 years of operational history as evidence of reliability and customer loyalty. Their website claims they handle "all currencies of major countries" and position themselves around reducing conversion costs to help customers retain more of their money.

However, there are notable limitations. The company's online presence is minimal beyond their website, with no visible regulatory credentials, licensing information, or third-party reviews displayed. Exchange rates listed on their site contain apparent data entry errors (DKK, NOK, and SEK showing "0.00" for buy rates). There is no information about compliance with anti-money laundering regulations, Know Your Customer requirements, or other financial services oversight. The business appears to operate as a traditional brick-and-mortar foreign exchange service rather than a modern financial services provider.
pros: 27 years of operational history in New York currency exchange market
Handles major world currencies including AUD, CAD, EUR, GBP, HKD, JPY, MXP, SGD, CHF
Advertises fast service with currency exchange completed within minutes
Offers traveler's checks in multiple currencies plus USD for secure travel
Physical location in Manhattan (1226 Broadway) with in-person service
Multiple contact options including phone (+1-646-473-1222) and WhatsApp
Claims to offer unbeatable rates to minimize customer conversion costs
cons: Website contains apparent data errors in exchange rates (three currencies showing 0.00 for buy rates)
No visible regulatory credentials, licensing information, or compliance certifications displayed
Limited online presence and no third-party reviews, verification, or consumer ratings available
Accepts only paper currency, limiting convenience for customers with other payment methods
No information about anti-money laundering procedures, customer verification, or financial oversight
Working hours inconsistency noted on website (two different Saturday hours listed)
best_for: International travelers departing from or returning to the New York area needing currency exchange
Customers requiring physical in-person currency exchange with immediate transactions
Individuals purchasing traveler's checks for secure international travel
Businesses or individuals exchanging major world currencies at brick-and-mortar locations
diagnosis: A & S Foreign Exchange is best for travelers and customers in the New York area who need in-person currency exchange or traveler's checks and prefer traditional brick-and-mortar service. The main caveat is the lack of visible regulatory transparency, online verification, and data accuracy issues on their website that prevent confident assessment of their legitimacy and current operational standards.
services: Currency exchange for Hong Kong Dollars (HKD)
Traveler's checks buying in foreign currencies
Traveler's checks buying in US Dollars (USD)
Paper currency exchange with competitive rates
meta_description: A & S Foreign Exchange is a New York-based currency exchange and traveler's check service with 27+ years in major world currencies.
